courses.course: PhD in AMC, World Mind Lab
courses.institution: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
University of Science and Technology of China

timeline.title: PhD Student
timeline.company: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
timeline.summary: PhD student in AMC, World Mind Lab advised by Professor Fangneng Zhan and Professor Hongbo Fu.
highlights: Research focus: multimodal LLMs, efficient foundation models, uncertainty quantification, 3D vision, and neural rendering.
Building on prior work in vision-language grounding, multimodal model merging, and reliable LLM evaluation.

timeline.title: Project UP (青云计划) Research Intern
timeline.summary: Research intern at Tencent Hunyuan 3D team through the Tencent Project UP (青云计划), focusing on 3D generation and reconstruction.

timeline.title: Graduate Student Researcher
timeline.company: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
timeline.summary: Worked with Professor Tianlong Chen on efficient and reliable machine learning, multimodal models, and LLM evaluation.
highlights: Co-authored papers accepted to CVPR 2026, NeurIPS 2025, ACL Findings 2025, EMNLP 2025, and IEEE S&P 2026.
Led work on MonoVLM, BetaConform, and UQ-Merge.

timeline.title: Graduate Research Assistant
timeline.company: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
timeline.summary: Graduate research assistant at UNC Department of Computer Science.

timeline.title: Research Intern
timeline.summary: Full-time research internship at Honda Research Institute USA.

timeline.title: Graduate Teaching Assistant
timeline.company: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
timeline.summary: Teaching assistant at UNC Department of Computer Science.

timeline.title: Undergraduate Researcher
timeline.summary: Conducted undergraduate research with Professor Yingyan (Celine) Lin on 3D vision and neural rendering.
highlights: Contributed to research on foundation neural radiance fields and high-efficiency hologram compression.

timeline.title: Undergraduate Researcher
timeline.company: USTC Algorithm and Data Application Lab
timeline.summary: Worked with Professor Guangzhong Sun on AI systems and performance prediction for deep learning workloads.
highlights: Co-authored GPU Occupancy Prediction of Deep Learning Models Using Graph Neural Network.
Built early research experience at the intersection of systems and machine learning.
